channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Beneath our feet lies a fungal superhighway stretching 68 quadrillion miles
item.description: Beneath our feet lies a vast hidden fungal superhighway that helps sustain much of life on Earthâand scientists have now mapped it for the first time....

item.title: This strange material can become strong or fall apart in seconds
item.description: Scientists have found that staple-shaped particles can tangle together to create a material that is both strong and flexible. Unlike conventional mate...

item.title: Scientists turn red lettuce green, leading to unexpected results
item.description: By blocking red pigment production in lettuce via genome editing, researchers triggered an accumulation of other beneficial compounds.

item.title: Oxford physicists push Schrödinger’s cat into stranger territory
item.description: A new type of quantum state, resembling Schrödinger’s cat, has been created using components that are themselves highly quantum in nature.
